# Social Preview

> Source asset and setup note for the repository social preview image.
>
> 仓库 social preview 图片的源文件和设置说明。

## Language

- [English](#english)
- [中文](#中文)

---

## English

The repository social preview image has been prepared as a source asset:

```text
.github/social-preview.svg
```

Recommended export size:

```text
1280 x 640
```

GitHub does not expose a stable public API or `gh repo edit` flag for uploading this image. If it must be updated, use browser automation or the repository web settings.

## 中文

仓库 social preview 图片已经准备为源文件：

```text
.github/social-preview.svg
```

建议导出尺寸：

```text
1280 x 640
```

GitHub 目前没有稳定公开 API 或 `gh repo edit` 参数可以上传这张图。如果后续需要更新，应使用浏览器自动化或仓库网页设置。
